name: Dividend & Earnings Calendar Sync
description: Weekly (Sunday 9 AM ET): Fetches upcoming dividend ex-dates from FMP and earnings dates from Finnhub. Populates dividend_history and earnings_calendar tables.

parameters.content:
## Dividend & Earnings Calendar

Required: httpHeaderAuth (Finnhub/FMP), postgresApi

parameters.query: INSERT INTO earnings_calendar (ticker, report_date, fiscal_quarter, eps_estimate, eps_actual, revenue_estimate, revenue_actual, surprise_percent) VALUES ('{{$json.ticker}}', '{{$json.report_date}}', '{{$json.fiscal_quarter}}', NULLIF(NULLIF('{{$json.eps_estimate}}', 'null'), '')::numeric, NULLIF(NULLIF('{{$json.eps_actual}}', 'null'), '')::numeric, NULLIF(NULLIF('{{$json.revenue_estimate}}', 'null'), '')::bigint, NULLIF(NULLIF('{{$json.revenue_actual}}', 'null'), '')::bigint, NULLIF(NULLIF('{{$json.surprise_percent}}', 'null'), '')::numeric) ON CONFLICT (ticker, report_date) DO UPDATE SET eps_estimate = EXCLUDED.eps_estimate, eps_actual = EXCLUDED.eps_actual, revenue_estimate = EXCLUDED.revenue_estimate, revenue_actual = EXCLUDED.revenue_actual, surprise_percent = EXCLUDED.surprise_percent;

INSERT INTO dividend_history (ticker, ex_date, payment_date, record_date, declaration_date, amount, frequency) VALUES ('{{$json.ticker}}', '{{$json.ex_date}}', NULLIF(NULLIF('{{$json.payment_date}}', 'null'), '')::date, NULLIF(NULLIF('{{$json.record_date}}', 'null'), '')::date, NULLIF(NULLIF('{{$json.declaration_date}}', 'null'), '')::date, NULLIF(NULLIF('{{$json.amount}}', 'null'), '')::numeric, NULLIF(NULLIF('{{$json.frequency}}', 'null'), '')) ON CONFLICT (ticker, ex_date) DO UPDATE SET payment_date = EXCLUDED.payment_date, amount = EXCLUDED.amount, frequency = EXCLUDED.frequency;
